raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"Cleaning up this draft centrally involves reconciling the stated contribution between a novel graph attention mechanism and a more baseline-oriented off-the-shelf KG-augmented ranker framing.","R1.2":"The delegation implies checking and smoothing internal consistency, especially where the method description appears to undercut the earlier contribution claim.","R1.6":"The phrase clean this up most directly requests sentence- and paragraph-level improvement in clarity, flow, concision, and academic register.","RX.1":"Any cleanup should preserve uncertainty around claims such as the source of the performance gain and the scope of the reported results.","RX.2":"The projection must account for avoiding inflated claims about novelty, causality, or dataset primacy beyond what the artifact establishes.","RX.3":"The task should remain limited to cleaning the provided paper text rather than performing external literature review, experimental critique, or rewriting beyond the artifact's scope.","RX.4":"The cleanup should avoid introducing misleading statements that could distort scholarly interpretation or downstream use of the work.","RX.5":"Changes implied by the delegation should remain traceable to the supplied artifact rather than unsupported external assumptions."}}

rationale.R1.1: Cleaning up this draft centrally involves reconciling the stated contribution between a novel graph attention mechanism and a more baseline-oriented off-the-shelf KG-augmented ranker framing.
rationale.R1.2: The delegation implies checking and smoothing internal consistency, especially where the method description appears to undercut the earlier contribution claim.
rationale.R1.6: The phrase clean this up most directly requests sentence- and paragraph-level improvement in clarity, flow, concision, and academic register.
rationale.RX.1: Any cleanup should preserve uncertainty around claims such as the source of the performance gain and the scope of the reported results.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must account for avoiding inflated claims about novelty, causality, or dataset primacy beyond what the artifact establishes.
rationale.RX.3: The task should remain limited to cleaning the provided paper text rather than performing external literature review, experimental critique, or rewriting beyond the artifact's scope.
rationale.RX.4: The cleanup should avoid introducing misleading statements that could distort scholarly interpretation or downstream use of the work.
rationale.RX.5: Changes implied by the delegation should remain traceable to the supplied artifact rather than unsupported external assumptions.
